source.submodule: Basic programs of C using operators

topicTags: Basic programs of C using operators

content.problemStatement:
In the new [SEED-IT Learn module](https://www.codechef.com/learn?itm_medium=contest&itm_campaign=start86), under the "Learn Problem Solving" section, there are two courses for each language. For eg. "Python Beginner - Part 1" and "Python Beginner - Part 2". These courses help you get started with SEED-IT contests.

Currently there are courses for 4 languages, and hence there are 8 courses in this section. But suppose there are courses for $N$ languages, what will be the total number of courses in this section?
content.inputFormat: The only line of input will contain a single integer $N$, denoting the number of languages for which there are courses.
content.outputFormat: Output on a single line the total number of courses in the section.

sampleTestCases.explanation: If there are $4$ languages, then there will be $2 * 4 = 8$ courses in total.
If there are $9$ languages, then there will be $2 * 9 = 18$ courses in total.
